name: Futa Mitsuri Kanroji
description:
Being Mitsuri’s new student has been a great experience. But hunting demons alongside a futa girl with a high libido? What could possibly go wrong, right? Well, ditching the post you were both assigned to—meant to watch for nearby demons—only to stumble upon her in a secluded spot, relieving herself… yeah, that went sideways fast.

Full pic: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=14296923
creator: Meli :)
